vision_profile.current_state: Mohit is a 23-year-old B.Com graduate with 1 year of customer support experience, earning ₹18,000 monthly.
vision_profile.main_blocker: His biggest fear is that his commerce background will lead to rejection from technical roles before he can demonstrate his capabilities.
vision_profile.top_motivation: He seeks a stable job with salary growth, free from call targets and rotational shifts.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: You can effectively handle customer interactions, identify basic technical issues, and communicate professionally in a support context.
milestones.identity_statement: You are building a strong foundation, leveraging your existing customer skills to enter the world of technical support.

science.desc: A customer is reporting a slow computer. How do you start diagnosing the issue without overwhelming them?

modules.title: Technical Communication & Documentation
lessons: Professional Email Etiquette for Technical Support

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: You understand fundamental networking concepts, can identify common network issues, and use basic tools for connectivity troubleshooting.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming proficient in the language and logic of computer networks, a core skill for any technical role.

science.desc: A user cannot access a website. You suspect a DNS issue. What steps do you take to confirm and resolve it?

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: You can understand relational database concepts, write basic SQL queries to retrieve and manipulate data, and assist with database-related support tasks.
milestones.identity_statement: You are gaining the ability to interact with data, a crucial skill for diagnosing and resolving issues in modern applications.

science.desc: Explain the difference between an INNER JOIN and a LEFT JOIN in SQL with a real-world example.

milestones.label: M04
milestones.o: You can systematically diagnose and resolve common software and system issues, analyze logs, and manage incidents effectively.
milestones.identity_statement: You are developing a methodical approach to problem-solving, becoming a reliable first responder for technical challenges.

science.desc: A critical application is crashing intermittently. You have access to system logs. How do you approach finding the cause?

modules.title: Testing, Logging & DevOps Foundations
lessons: Setting Up Basic Health Checks & Alerts

milestones.label: M05
milestones.o: You can write basic Python scripts to automate repetitive tasks, use command-line tools efficiently, and understand version control fundamentals.
milestones.identity_statement: You are transforming from a reactive problem-solver to a proactive automator, making support more efficient and scalable.

science.desc: You need to process a log file daily to extract specific error messages. How would you write a Python script to do this?

modules.title: Collaboration & Tools
lessons: Using Git for Basic File Tracking

milestones.label: M06
milestones.o: You can troubleshoot issues in cloud environments, understand basic security principles, and contribute to maintaining system reliability.
milestones.identity_statement: You are expanding your technical horizon, understanding the broader infrastructure that underpins modern applications.

modules.title: Cloud & Deployment
lessons: Introduction to Cloud Computing (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS)
Basic Cloud Service Providers (AWS, Azure, GCP)

science.desc: Describe a scenario where a user reports suspicious emails. How would you guide them and what security advice would you provide?

milestones.label: M07
milestones.o: You are fully prepared for Technical Support Associate interviews, can articulate your skills confidently, and have a clear path for continuous professional development.
milestones.identity_statement: You are ready to confidently step into your target role, equipped with both technical skills and the confidence to showcase them.

modules.title: Capstone & Interview Readiness
lessons: Building a Portfolio of Support Scenarios

science.desc: You're asked about your commerce background in an interview. How do you frame it as an asset for a technical support role?

modules.title: Capstone & Career Readiness
lessons: Identifying Specialization Paths in Tech Support
